item.title: I must go. My people need me
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: Surprise! It’s Felix Friday!
item.description:
Today is Felix’s annual checkup and bloodwork day to get all of his prescriptions renewed so old Dad is helping new Dad out by giving him a ride! They’re enjoying their day together and heading to see old friends at the Vet.
Still doin’ the awesome catches!
Nobody has ever been a gooder boy than Fe! He’s so much better now. Hardly any spicy fly!
In the meantime I have this baked potato in the pack n play. Her Mama Dog rejected her so she’s in the Felix and Friends Incubator/Puppy Room.
She’s a very good puppy.
And this is Gerald. I got to meet him yesterday. He’s a foster puppy of a friend of mine. I think his level of chill is admirable.
Gerald! He’s up for adoption in Anchorage. I was so excited to have a Felix Friday. We sure do miss all of you guys and hope everybody has a wonderful weekend.
item.dc:creator: thevaiobandit101

item.title: Send this to your local self-described alpha
item.dc:creator: Montanaebananae

item.title: Not so subtle hint - take me with you!
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: If you're having a bad day, here's an assortment wholesome dump to make you smile : )
item.description:
1. That's how you have fun
2. Chunky boyyy
3. Doggos acting like drunk buddies at a bar
4. Piggy getting combed
5. Bunny making its bunny bed
6. Them eyebrows
7
8
9. This game looks fun
10. Getting a shower
11. Cow zoomies
12. Horsie zoomies
13. Here we have a tree logging machine having breakfeast in its natural habitat
14. Otter having its temperature taken : )
15 Thank you if you made this far in the dump!Let me share with you that as well as posting on Imgur, I'm also working on a game of my own. A passion project, if you will. It's a "Stanley Parable" inspired first person narrative game. If you like the humor of this dump, you might actually like the game to (at least what my friend on Discord tells me, that one friend). Anyway please wishlist it helps small game devs like me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a great Saturday!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Exhibition in the Bomb Shelter! I'm so excited to be a part of the contemporary art event in Rivne city in Ukraine. I think it's so unique place to do an exhibition in such a horrible time. We are continuing living and fighting.

item.title: It’s even funnier when you find out your SSN isn’t even supposed to be used as a valid form of ID
item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: Corporate Culture
item.description: Company had a “re-org,” meaning they wanted to layoff people under the guise of reducing redundancy. I wasn’t laid off but demoted from Project Manager to Release Manager. I am the highest performing PM in the group and highly respected and the new Program Manager wanted me to work directly with him after the reopening-org. Management had meeting with COO and everyone wanted me to continue as PM but was denied. No solid explanation at all. The only thing I can think of is the last project I worked on was with a completely incompetent Client Success VP who wanted to dabble in Product Management threw me under the bus. This guy ignored all process and status reports. Caused all the engineers to want to quit. Scope creeped the project to oblivion. I spoke out against these activities with him and my boss the entire project. Had two senior level PMs speak directly to this VP and no change. I am being punished because I am not a VP I guess. Fuck this world fuck companies fuck it all. I quit and going to move back home with my dad and work at a grocery store.
item.dc:creator: nightmanchamp

item.title: Alcohol & Other stuff - Stolen Dump
item.dc:creator: jorge0

item.title: Worked together for 9 years
item.description: She was buying visa gift cards from Amazon and writing them off as office expenses and tricking the auditor into letting her post the transactions without receipts. She was also selling company baseball tickets on a seatgeek account. We worked together for 9 years, I’m just blown away…. Please no victim shaming, I’m not in a place to be able to handle it. Yes I’m a business owner, no she wasn’t being mistreated. She made 75k a year plus bonuses and benefits. She never had to work over time, she was held in high esteem and treated with respect deserving of her high position in the company. We’re an award winning employer based on 3rd party anonymous surveys. I Don’t know why I’m qualifying this. Maybe deep down I feel like it’s my fault like maybe we did something to her that drove her to this or it’s my fault for trusting her. I don’t know… it just hurts in so many ways…
item.dc:creator: frackinxcylon
